BrahmsAI
Local model access

Enter your model API key.

BrahmsAI detects Gemini, OpenAI, Claude, or OpenRouter keys, validates access, then runs the pipeline with the matching provider. The key is not saved in the browser and is only sent to your local FastAPI server for this session.

For local use only. Refreshing the page will ask for the key again.

BrahmsAI Decision Console

PCT-guided antibiotic stewardship in one clinical view.

Enter structured observations, trend serial PCT values, and run the four-agent stewardship pipeline without changing the existing API payload.

Timeout45s

Safety context

Clinical Flags

Overrides and confounders update the live snapshot before the pipeline runs.

Clinical InstabilityHypotension, altered consciousness, respiratory failure
High Risk PatientImmunosuppressed, neutropenic, or asplenic
Renal FailurePCT falsely elevated due to reduced clearance
Recent SurgeryNon-infectious elevation 24-72h post-op
Burns / TraumaNon-infectious PCT elevation expected
ImmunosuppressedPCT response may be blunted
Cardiac FailureMild elevation possible without infection
Symptom OnsetEarly testing may under-call infection
hr
Kinetic intelligence

Serial PCT Tracking

Live decline calculator, Day 4 alert, and serial measurements are sent as `previous_pct`.

Peak-to-current decline
--%
Add previous PCT values to calculate response.
<5050-79≥80
On Antibiotics?Enables treatment-day context and discontinuation logic
Serial PCT Timeline
Day 4 alert: PCT decline below 80% threshold - treatment failure criteria may be met
80
Stop thresholdAt least 80% decline from peak supports discontinuation.
50
Partial responseContinue therapy and reassess trend within 24 hours.
!
Treatment failure watchDay 4 with insufficient decline may require escalation.
